## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy sprint standup to align on client onboarding plans and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Developed 8-week strategy sprint framework to guide client onboarding and execution](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Focusing on rapid calibration and risk mitigation in early weeks to demonstrate value quickly](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Need to prioritize and tailor approach for each client based on their specific needs and timelines](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Creating reusable AI-ready artifacts to improve efficiency and provide value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

## Topics

### 8-Week Strategy Sprint Framework

  - [Developed baseline 8-week plan for client onboarding and execution](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Key phases: kick-off, learn quickly, set foundation, develop pillars, calibrate, publish](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Emphasis on being responsive, unblocking issues, and ingesting context upfront](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Goal is to shape strategy quickly and move to execution to demonstrate value](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### Calibration Process

  - [Avoid going straight to final content without understanding client preferences](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Use "tasting menu" approach with different content styles/tones for client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Develop rubric based on client preferences to guide future content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Tailor calibration to specific content types (e.g. listicles vs how-to articles)](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

### Client-Specific Updates

  - [GetPod: Need to redo calibration and demonstrate clear value in next 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Engine: Updating Airtable with assignments, tagging content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Hypergrowth: Custom approach, waiting on resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Biologica: Handling confidentiality concerns with shared documents](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)

### Artifact Creation

  - [Developing reusable, AI-ready artifacts for each client project](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=2198.0)
  - [Includes company context, research summaries, brand guidelines, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)
  - [Can be exported as PDFs and used in AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=2246.0)
  - [Provides value to clients even if engagement ends early](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)

  - [Sadira: Continue updating Engine Airtable with assignments and tagging](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)
  - [Team: Enrich Airtables for all clients with relevant information](https://fathom.video/share/xuf3ET3DLphxKsSsmgsANLXV5YyS4Kmm?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)
